us_stocks.headline: 美股因AI贸易和霍尔木兹担忧下跌
us_stocks.dek: 美国股市下跌，投资者逃离波动加剧的人工智能投资。
body: 美国股市周一收跌，投资者逃离波动加剧的人工智能投资。[数据未验证]
三星电子令人失望的财报引发了AI硬件股的抛售。[数据未验证]
霍尔木兹海峡再次出现航运中断加剧了地缘政治担忧。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: 美国恢复对伊朗强有力打击
us_stocks.dek: 美国中央司令部宣布对伊朗发动新一轮打击，此前撤销了伊朗石油出口授权。
body: 美国中央司令部宣布对伊朗发动新一轮强力打击。[数据未验证]
美国当天早些时候撤销了伊朗石油出口授权。[数据未验证]
地缘风险升级推动油价上涨。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: 美国报复伊朗
us_stocks.dek: 美国对伊朗发动报复性打击，中东局势进一步紧张。
body: 美国对伊朗发动报复性打击，中东局势进一步紧张。[数据未验证]
伯尼·桑德斯鼓励格雷厄姆·普拉特纳退出缅因州参议员竞选。[数据未验证]
WSJ的互动游戏测试读者点球扑救能力。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: 油价因供应中断担忧上涨
us_stocks.dek: 亚洲早盘交易中油价上涨，因供应中断担忧重燃。
body: 亚洲早盘交易中油价上涨，因供应中断担忧重燃。[数据未验证]
霍尔木兹海峡冲突威胁全球石油运输。[数据未验证]
交易商关注美国是否进一步收紧对伊朗的制裁。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: Cramer：三星业绩或预示AI领导力转变
us_stocks.dek: CNBC的Jim Cramer表示三星财报引发AI硬件股抛售，同时今年落后的科技股反弹。
body: CNBC的Jim Cramer表示，三星财报引发AI硬件股抛售。[数据未验证]
同时，今年表现落后的许多科技股出现反弹。[数据未验证]
Cramer认为这可能标志着AI领导格局的转变。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: 亚洲货币因中东紧张多数走弱
us_stocks.dek: 亚洲货币兑美元在早盘交易中普遍走软，中东紧张局势升级引发避险。
body: 亚洲货币兑美元在早盘交易中普遍走软。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: AI泡沫：好泡沫，坏交易
us_stocks.dek: 有分析指出当前AI热潮存在泡沫特征，但作为交易标的风险较高。
body: 有分析指出当前AI热潮存在泡沫特征，但基本面尚好。[数据未验证]
作为交易标的，AI概念股风险较高。[数据未验证]
投资者需区分长期价值与短期投机。[数据未验证]

us_stocks.headline: 特斯拉交付结果支持持续悲观
us_stocks.dek: 特斯拉第二季度交付量不及预期，加剧市场悲观情绪。
body: 特斯拉第二季度交付量不及预期，加剧了对需求的担忧。[数据未验证]
特斯拉股价当日下跌4.02美元，收于402.90美元。[yfinance @ 2026-07-08 14:30 MYT]
分析师认为，特斯拉面临日益激烈的竞争和价格战压力。[数据未验证]

ai.headline: OpenAI股份与财政部AI警告
ai.dek: This is today's edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what's going on in the world of technology.
body: This is today's edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what's going on in the world of technology.
Your family's $300 stake in OpenAI Sam Altman's pr...
The Treasury's AI warning highlights growing concerns.

ai.headline: 微软加入AI降本趋势
ai.dek: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.
body: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.
The company is relying more on its own models to reduce costs.
This move aligns with a broader industry trend of AI cost-cutting.

ai.headline: SwarmResearch:编码代理开放发现
ai.dek: arXiv:2607.02807v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems.
body: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems.
However, they tend to converge onto a local optimum.
SwarmResearch orchestrates multiple agents to overcome this limitation.

ai.headline: Oyster-II:强化学习LLM安全对齐
ai.dek: arXiv:2607.02914v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse applications, yet ensuring their simultaneous safety, helpfulness
body: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse applications.
Yet ensuring their simultaneous safety, helpfulness, and alignment remains challenging.
Oyster-II proposes a reinforcement learning approach for constructive safety alignment.

ai.headline: AI架构基础助力IT扩展
ai.dek: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow.
body: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases.
That constant evolution also introduces risks that IT leaders must address.
The foundational elements of AI architecture are key to scaling effectively.

ai.headline: 开源AI崛起未伤Anthropic
ai.dek: Open source models' success isn't coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.
body: Open source models' success isn't coming at the expense of frontier labs.
Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.
Anthropic remains competitive despite the rise of open source AI.

ai.headline: 美首辆自主地面车在乌作战
ai.dek: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.
body: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.
These are the first American autonomous ground vehicles fighting in the war.
The deployment marks a significant milestone for military robotics.

ai.headline: iFLYTEK具身全知技术报告
ai.dek: arXiv:2607.02542v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control acti
body: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions.
They must anticipate how their environment will evolve and produce precise control actions.
iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni presents a unified framework for such agents.

ai.headline: 科学AI自动化数据准备
ai.dek: arXiv:2607.02771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Leadership computing facilities steward large-scale scientific datasets that routinely require substantial transformation before serving as AI training
body: Leadership computing facilities steward large-scale scientific datasets.
These datasets routinely require substantial transformation before serving as AI training data.
Automated Data Readiness for Scientific AI proposes a solution to streamline this process.

ai.headline: Claude Cowork扩展移动网页
ai.dek: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.
body: With this update, users can start a task from their desk.
They can get status updates on their phone and pick up the finished output later.
This works even if their laptop is closed, enabling seamless cross-device workflow.
